# User Stories

## US-1: Test Runner Status Display @feature1

As a developer, I want to see test runner progress in the statusline with `{percent}%` format and `{bar}` visualization, so that I can monitor test execution without switching context.

## US-2: Session Management @feature2

As a developer, I want test sessions tracked via `TEST_STATUSLINE_SESSION={prefix}` environment variable, so that parallel test runs don't interfere with each other.
